_schema_notes.quizzes.batch_size: Number of questions per quiz session (default: 3, user-configurable)
_schema_notes.quizzes.levels: Keyed by 'module-N/level-N'. Each entry has: total_questions (int), answered (array of {question_number, score, date}), unanswered (array of question numbers), complete (bool), overall_score (number or null)
